summary: Comprehensive testing of Customer Authentication Flow completed. All critical features working correctly: Registration, Login, Auth Persistence (/api/auth/me with Bearer token), Protected Routes, Product Detail Modal, and Add to Cart functionality.

minor.issue: Not accessible via public URL (only /api/* routes are proxied through ingress)
minor.note: This is expected behavior - internal health check endpoint

critical_code_review_comments: AuthContext.jsx correctly uses Bearer token in Authorization header for /api/auth/me (Line 16-19)
MemberDashboard.jsx properly redirects unauthenticated users to /login (Line 35-39)
ProductCard.jsx reviews state correctly declared at component level (Line 137-140)
Backend server.py get_current_user excludes _id from MongoDB response (Line 958)
Backend /auth/login returns access_token and user data correctly (Line 4148-4160)

success_rate.backend: 94% (16/17 tests passed - 1 minor failure on /health/db route)

seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during pytest and UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth flow fully tested and working. Key fixes verified: 1) Auth persistence bug fixed - token properly sent to /api/auth/me with Bearer header, 2) ProductDetailModal crash fixed - reviews state correctly declared at component level. Product sync from Shopify working - 103 cakes visible on /cakes page.

backend_api_tests.test_api_health: PASS - API health endpoint returns healthy status
backend_api_tests.test_db_health: FAIL - /health/db not accessible via public URL (expected - internal endpoint)
backend_api_tests.test_register_duplicate_email: PASS - Duplicate email correctly rejected with 400
backend_api_tests.test_login_success: PASS - Login returns access_token and user data
backend_api_tests.test_auth_me_with_valid_token: PASS - /api/auth/me returns user data with Bearer token
backend_api_tests.test_get_products: PASS - Products endpoint returns products from Shopify sync
backend_api_tests.test_my_orders_with_auth: PASS - Protected endpoint works with token
backend_api_tests.test_my_pets_with_auth: PASS - Protected endpoint works with token

frontend_ui_tests.homepage_load: PASS - Homepage loads with expected content
frontend_ui_tests.login_page: PASS - Login form with email/password fields
frontend_ui_tests.login_flow: PASS - Login redirects to /dashboard with 'Welcome back!' toast
frontend_ui_tests.registration_flow: PASS - Registration auto-logs in and redirects to dashboard with 'Welcome to the family!' toast
frontend_ui_tests.protected_route_redirect: PASS - /dashboard redirects to /login when not authenticated
frontend_ui_tests.dashboard_display: PASS - Shows user info, membership tier, tabs (Overview, Orders, Pets, Addresses, Settings)
frontend_ui_tests.product_listing: PASS - /cakes shows 103 products with images and prices
frontend_ui_tests.product_modal: PASS - Opens without errors, shows size/flavor selection, personalization fields
frontend_ui_tests.add_to_cart: PASS - Adding item to cart works, shows toast and cart sidebar

auth_persistence_bug.description: Token now properly sent to /api/auth/me with Bearer header in Authorization
auth_persistence_bug.evidence: test_auth_me_with_valid_token passed, UI login flow works correctly

product_detail_modal_crash.description: Reviews state correctly declared at component level (Line 137-140 in ProductCard.jsx)
product_detail_modal_crash.evidence: Product modal opens without errors, reviews section visible
